goal: Add a CUDA-host real-adapter handoff generator that composes the current candidate scan, prerequisite audit, and v0 release readiness reports into one operator-executable plan for closing the remaining M6-RC blocker. The handoff must list exact required inputs and commands for candidate scan, adapter intake, preflight, live no-fake Docker endpoint gate, and readiness recheck without claiming M6-RC or v0 GO.
head: 80ac19a
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, or release evidence acceptance
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add a handoff generator script/tests/current handoff evidence and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Handoff summarizes current candidate scan and prereq/readiness decisions
Handoff lists required real CUDA adapter inputs and no-fake endpoint evidence invariants
Handoff emits executable command sequence for candidate scan, intake/preflight/live RC gate, and readiness recheck
Current environment remains NOT_GO with zero GO adapter candidates
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO due missing real trained adapter endpoint evidence.
This gate adds operator handoff tooling only and does not generate a trained adapter.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped CUDA real-adapter handoff gate after confirming current final-program blocker is limited to real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint and the repo has separate candidate, intake, endpoint, M6, and v0 readiness tools but no single operator-executable handoff bundle.
phase_notes.audit: Read WORKING.md, CONTEXT.md, current v0 readiness audit, M6 prereq audit, candidate scan, candidate locator, real adapter intake verifier, endpoint capture, M6 verifier, and RC gate runner. The current blocker remains real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint; the current environment has zero GO adapter candidates and missing adapter files, matching Docker image, and host CUDA.
phase_notes.build: Added scripts/build_real_adapter_handoff.py, focused tests, and current JSON/Markdown handoff evidence. The handoff composes candidate scan, prereq, and readiness data into required operator inputs plus commands for scan, intake, preflight, live no-fake RC gate, and GO readiness recheck.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, py_compile, focused handoff pytest, current handoff generation, handoff JSON validation, v0 release readiness expected NOT_GO, readiness JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: CUDA handoff tooling is complete. Current handoff decision is WAITING_FOR_REAL_ADAPTER_INPUTS and does not claim M6-RC or v0 GO; release readiness remains NOT_GO until real trained CUDA lora_adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exists.

pabcd.approved_scope: Real adapter CUDA handoff generator script/tests/evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
